title: Trump named unindicted co-conspirator in Arizona 'fake elector' case
shortDescription: Donald Trump was named unindicted co-conspirators in Arizona charges against so-called 'fake electors.'

title: Biden, world leaders call for release of hostages held by Hamas
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and leaders of 17 other countries issue joint statement calling for release of hostages and ending crisis in Gaza.

title: Will Joe Biden be on the Ohio ballot? Lawmakers still hashing out plan
shortDescription: The Biden campaign claims the Democratic incumbent will be on the ballot in all 50 states but there are still some technical hiccups to work out.

title: Trump's immunity fight at Supreme Court: Live updates of oral arguments
shortDescription: Lawyers for former president Donald Trump argue to the Supreme Court that he can't be criminally charged for any action he took while in office.

title: Day 7 at Trump trial: Defense may attack catch-and-kill story
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan could punish Donald Trump over a gag order and Trump's lawyers could start attacking tabloid witness David Pecker on Day 7.

title: Supreme Court hears Donald Trump immunity claim
shortDescription: The Supreme Court will decide on whether or not Donald Trump has presidential immunity in his federal election trial. This is what we know now.

title: Daily Briefing: Trump v. United States
shortDescription: Supreme Court to hear a historic immunity case and more news to know Thursday.

title: Biden, losing young voters over Israel, will need party's left-flank
shortDescription: Progressive lawmakers are warning their support isn't a magic bullet for the president's shaky ground with young voters over Gaza.

title: Flint residents to Biden: Pay up for decade-old water crisis failures
shortDescription: The state of Michigan and city of Flint have both settled with residents over the water poisoning that began in April 2014. The feds have not.

title: Read the indictment of Arizona fake electors, Trump allies
shortDescription: The indictment, issued by an Arizona grand jury on April 24, 2024, alleges a conspiracy aimed at "preventing the lawful transfer of the presidency."

title: Who are the Republicans facing charges in Arizona fake electors case?
shortDescription: Eleven prominent Arizona Republicans are facing charges in the state's fake electors probe. Who are they?

title: Former Trump aides, fake electors indicted in AZ
shortDescription: An Arizona grand jury indicted several former aides of Donald Trump along with fake electors who are alleged to be part of a 2020 election fraud scheme.

title: Trump to campaign in Michigan next week amid NYC criminal trial
shortDescription: While waiting for the Supreme Court to rule on presidential immunity, Trump will return to the campaign trail in Saginaw on May 1.

title: Arizona grand jury indicts Trump allies, appearing to include Giuliani, Meadows
shortDescription: A grand jury has charged 11 Arizona Republicans and seven former aides to Donald Trump in a scheme to keep Trump in the White House.

title: Arizona House votes to repeal 1864 abortion ban
shortDescription: The Arizona House voted to repeal a controversial near-total abortion ban dating back to 1864. Republicans had blocked a previous vote to repeal.

title: Government watchdog alleges Trump campaign broke law with legal bills
shortDescription: The complaint filed by the Campaign Legal Center alleges payments to Red Curve Solutions seem "designed to obscure" who is being paid for legal work.

title: CNN report on Trump soiling himself in courtroom is fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: A CNN spokesperson said the news network didn't report such a claim. No such report is found on CNN's website.

title: New law starts the clock for TikTok
shortDescription: TikTok is facing a ban in the United States, but don't delete your app just yet – legal battles loom. It's Wednesday's news.

title: Primary turnout lukewarm in Pennsylvania ahead of Biden-Trump redux
shortDescription: More than 200,000 Pennsylvanians voted 'other' in the primary. A few million stayed home. So what will these voters do in November?

title: Supreme Court and Trump: What to know about Thursday's immunity case
shortDescription: The historic arguments about the presumptive GOP nominee for president is the final case the Supreme Court is considering this term.

title: Biden meets 4-year-old American who was held hostage by Hamas
shortDescription: President Joe Biden met Wednesday with four-year-old Abigail Edan, the youngest American hostage released by Hamas.

title: New rule bans Arkansas voters from registering with e-signatures
shortDescription: Voting registration groups criticize the state's Board of Election emergency rule to ban e-signatures on voter registration forms
